turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi, I wanted to know specifically about Dr. Arvind Mehta. Is he available this week? He's a gastroenterologist I think.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I appreciate you reaching out. Could I confirm — you're looking for Dr. Arvind Mehta's schedule specifically?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Yes, exactly. Not just any gastro doctor, I need to see him. I've seen him before.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I completely understand that you'd prefer Dr. Mehta specifically. However, I don't have visibility into individual doctors' detailed schedules — especially for queries about a specific named physician's availability and leave status. This needs to be confirmed by our front desk team.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Oh okay. Can they tell me?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Absolutely. They'll have full access to Dr. Mehta's current schedule. Let me connect you to our staff who can help you right away.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Please hold — connecting you to our staff now.
